response: The April update highlights key achievements—hitting 10K monthly active users, securing an $8M Series A term sheet at a $40M pre-money valuation, and hiring a VP of Sales—alongside strong metrics ($85K MRR, +12% MoM growth) but a high burn rate ($120K/month), leaving 11 months of runway post-raise. **Action item:** The fundraising round will close on **May 10**, so final commitments must be confirmed by then.
